mapper.sql: id , company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, picture, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark
mapper.select: select state from test_sample where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT t2.company_id as companyId, t2.sample_name as sampleName, t2.sample_type as sampleType, t2.sample_code as sampleCode, t2.specs as specs, t2.batch_number as batchNumber, t2.manufacturer as manufacturer, t2.sample_origin as sampleOrigin, t2.outward as outward, t2.outward_describe as outwardDescribe, t2.picture as picture, t2.save_place as savePlace, t2.admin as admin, t2.sample_groups as sampleGroups, t2.quantity_per_group as quantityPerGroup, t2.inspector as inspector, t2.received_date as receivedDate, t2.sample_requirement as sampleRequirement, t2.generation as generation, t2.state as state, t2.check_date as checkDate, t2.remark as remark, t2.product_id as productId, t1.sample_id as id, t2.alias_name as aliasName, t2.sample_quantity as sampleQuantity, t2.sample_remark as sampleRemark, t2.pid as pid FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample AS t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId} order by t2.id asc

SELECT t2.company_id as companyId, t2.sample_name as sampleName, t2.sample_type as sampleType, t2.sample_code as sampleCode, t2.specs as specs, t2.batch_number as batchNumber, t2.manufacturer as manufacturer, t2.sample_origin as sampleOrigin, t2.outward as outward, t2.picture as picture, t2.save_place as savePlace, t2.admin as admin, t2.sample_groups as sampleGroups, t2.quantity_per_group as quantityPerGroup, t2.inspector as inspector, t2.received_date as receivedDate, t2.sample_requirement as sampleRequirement, t2.generation as generation, t2.state as state, t2.check_date as checkDate, t2.remark as remark, t2.product_id as productId, t2.id as id, t2.alias_name as aliasName, t2.sample_quantity as sampleQuantity, t2.sample_remark as sampleRemark, t2.pid as pid FROM test_sample AS t2 WHERE t2.company_id =#{companyId} AND t2.is_use = 0 ORDER BY t2.id DESC

SELECT t2.company_id as companyId, t2.sample_name as sampleName, t2.sample_type as sampleType, t2.sample_code as sampleCode, t2.specs as specs, t2.batch_number as batchNumber, t2.manufacturer as manufacturer, t2.sample_origin as sampleOrigin, t2.outward as outward, t2.picture as picture, t2.save_place as savePlace, t2.admin as admin, t2.sample_groups as sampleGroups, t2.quantity_per_group as quantityPerGroup, t2.inspector as inspector, t2.received_date as receivedDate, t2.sample_requirement as sampleRequirement, t2.generation as generation, t2.state as state, t2.check_date as checkDate, t2.remark as remark, t2.product_id as productId, t2.id as id, t2.alias_name as aliasName, t2.sample_quantity as sampleQuantity, t2.sample_remark as sampleRemark, t2.pid as pid, t2.outward_describe as outwardDescribe FROM test_sample AS t2 WHERE t2.pid = #{id}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTR( sample_code, 1, 12 ) CODE, sample_name FROM test_sample ) t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT id, company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, picture, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark, product_id,is_use FROM test_sample ) t2 ON t1.CODE = SUBSTR( t2.sample_code, 1, 12 ) WHERE t2.is_use = 0 AND t2.company_id = 4681
SELECT t1.id value, t1.NAME label FROM test_team AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_check_item_team_rel AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.team_id WHERE t2.check_item_id = #{checkItemId} ORDER BY t1.sort ASC
SELECT t1.pid, t1.id, t1.NAME FROM test_team AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_check_item_team_rel AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.team_id WHERE t2.check_item_id = #{checkItemId} and del_flag = 0 ORDER BY t1.sort ASC

SELECT id, company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, picture, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark,product_id FROM test_sample
is_use = 0
and sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and batch_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{batchNumber},'%')
and manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%',#{manufacturer},'%')
and str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= str_to_date( #{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) <= str_to_date( #{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and product_id = #{productId}
and company_id = #{companyId}
order by insert_flag desc

SELECT id, company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, picture, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark,product_id FROM test_sample where SUBSTR( sample_code, 1, 12 ) in
#{code}

SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTR( sample_code, 1, 12 ) CODE, sample_name FROM test_sample
is_use = 0
and sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and batch_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{batchNumber},'%')
and manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%',#{manufacturer},'%')
and str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= str_to_date( #{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) <= str_to_date( #{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and product_id = #{productId}
and company_id = #{companyId}
order by CODE
mapper.insert:
insert into test_sample (id, company_id, sample_name, product_id, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, picture, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark, insert_flag, is_use,sample_quantity,alias_name,sample_remark, sample_type)
values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specs,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insertFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{sampleQuantity},#{aliasName},#{sampleRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into test_sample
id,
company_id,
sample_name,
sample_code,
specs,
batch_number,
manufacturer,
sample_origin,
outward,
picture,
save_place,
admin,
sample_groups,
quantity_per_group,
inspector,
received_date,
sample_requirement,
generation,
state,
check_date,
remark,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{specs,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update test_sample
company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sample_name = #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR},
sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specs = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
batch_number = #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
picture = #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
save_place = #{savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
admin = #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_groups = #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity_per_group = #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inspector = #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR},
sample_requirement = #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
check_date = #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_use=#{isUse,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sample_retention_period=#{sampleRetentionPeriod,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sample_process_mode=#{sampleProcessMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_reserved_remrk=#{sampleReservedRemrk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_out_put_remrk=#{sampleOutPutRemrk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
approver = #{approver,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_retention_area = #{sampleRetentionArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_sample
specs = #{specs,jdbcType=INTEGER},
generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR},
sample_requirement = #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_quantity = #{sampleQuantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where insert_flag = #{insertFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update test_sample set file = #{fileUrl},file_url_str=#{fileUrlStr} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_sample set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sample_name = #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR}, sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, specs = #{specs,jdbcType=INTEGER}, batch_number = #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, picture = #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, save_place = #{savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, admin = #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_groups = #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity_per_group = #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inspector = #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR}, sample_requirement = #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, check_date = #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t1.company_id companyId, t2.company_name companyName, t1.product_id productId, t1.sample_name sampleName, t1.specs specs, t1.manufacturer manufacturer, t1.sample_origin sampleOrigin, t1.outward outward, t1.save_place savePlace, t1.admin admin, t1.sample_groups sampleGroups, t1.quantity_per_group quantityPerGroup, t1.inspector inspector, t1.received_date receivedDate, t1.sample_requirement sampleRequirement, t1.generation generation, t1.insert_flag insertFlag, t1.sample_quantity sampleQuantity, t1.alias_name aliasName FROM test_sample t1 LEFT JOIN test_company t2 ON t1.company_id = t2.company_id where insert_flag = #{insertFlag}

SELECT sample_code sampleCode, sample_name sampleName, alias_name aliasName, sample_retention_period, sample_retention_area, specs, outward, inspector, received_date, quantity_per_group quantityPerGroup, outward_describe outwardDescribe, sample_type sampleType, generation, sample_quantity, batch_number, manufacturer, id FROM test_sample WHERE id = #{sampleId}

SELECT sample_code sampleCode, sample_name sampleName, alias_name aliasName, specs, outward, quantity_per_group quantityPerGroup, outward_describe outwardDescribe, sample_type sampleType, id, received_date receivedDate FROM test_sample WHERE pid = #{sampleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT into test_entrusted_sample_details_rel(id, sample_id, entrustment_id) VALUES (id, #{sampleId}, #{entrustmentId})
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(SUBSTR(sample_code, 9, 5) + 0) maxNum FROM test_sample WHERE sample_code LIKE CONCAT('%-', #{year}, '-%')

SELECT alias_name sampleName, sample_code sampleNumber, sample_quantity sampleQuantity, outward sampleDesc, received_date sampleTime, outward_describe outwardDescribe, sample_type sampleType, specs FROM test_sample WHERE id = #{sampleId}

SELECT sample_name, specs, manufacturer, batch_number, sample_quantity, outward, sample_code FROM test_sample WHERE id IN (select distinct sample_id from test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel where entrust_id = #{entrustId} )

SELECT t2.company_id as companyId, t2.sample_name as sampleName, t2.sample_type as sampleType, t2.sample_code as sampleCode, t2.specs as specs, t2.batch_number as batchNumber, t2.manufacturer as manufacturer, t2.sample_origin as sampleOrigin, t2.outward as outward, t2.picture as picture, t2.save_place as savePlace, t2.admin as admin, t2.sample_groups as sampleGroups, t2.quantity_per_group as quantityPerGroup, t2.inspector as inspector, t2.received_date as receivedDate, t2.sample_requirement as sampleRequirement, t2.generation as generation, t2.state as state, t2.check_date as checkDate, t2.remark as remark, t2.product_id as productId, t2.id as id, t2.alias_name as aliasName, t2.sample_quantity as sampleQuantity, t2.sample_remark as sampleRemark, t2.pid as pid, t2.outward_describe as outwardDescribe FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel as t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample AS t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id =#{entrustmentId} ORDER BY t2.id DESC
SELECT t1.pid, t1.id, t1.NAME FROM test_team AS t1

SELECT t1.id as sampleId, t1.sample_code, t1.alias_name as sample_name, t1.sample_retention_period, t1.sample_process_mode, t1.sample_reserved_remrk, t1.sample_out_put_remrk, t1.received_date as outboundDeliveryDate, t5.sampler as sampleTaker, t1.approver as approver, t3.acceptance_date, t3.request_date, t3.entrust_people, t4.STATUS, t4.operator_id, t4.operator_name, t4.time, t5.task_code, t5.orderer as taskPublisher -- ,t5.orderer as operator_name FROM ( SELECT aa.* FROM test_sample as aa GROUP BY aa.sample_code ) as t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info AS t3 ON t3.id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample_circulation_record AS t4 ON t4.sample_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_task AS t5 ON t5.entrustment_id = t2.entrustment_id
and t5.task_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskCode},"%")
and t1.sample_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleCode},"%")
and t5.orderer LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleHolder},"%")
and t3.acceptance_date BETWEEN #{startTime} and #{endTime}
and t5.orderer LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskPublisher},"%")
and t5.id is not null
ORDER BY t3.acceptance_date desc, t1.id

select * from sample_v_1
and task_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskCode},"%")
and sample_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleCode},"%")
and operator_name LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleHolder},"%")
and acceptance_date BETWEEN #{startTime} and #{endTime}
and taskPublisher LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskPublisher},"%")
mapper.update:
UPDATE test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel SET
mid_state = 1,
state = #{state},
reviewed_by_set_url = #{reviewedBySetUrl},
instrument_status = #{instrumentStatus}, original_record_status = #{originalRecordStatus}, original_data = #{data}, original_record_status = #{originalRecordStatus}, opinion = #{opinion} WHERE id = #{itemId}
mapper.select:
SELECT STATUS, sample_id, time, operator_name FROM test_sample_circulation_record WHERE sample_id = #{sampleId}
AND (status = '0' or status= '1' or status = '2' or status= '5')
AND (status = '3' or status= '4')
order by STATUS ASC

SELECT * FROM sample_v_2
and task_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskCode},"%")
and sample_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleCode},"%")
and sampleHolder LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleHolder},"%")
and acceptance_date BETWEEN #{startTime} and #{endTime}
and taskPublisher LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskPublisher},"%")
limit #{pageNum},#{pageSize}

SELECT count(*) FROM sample_v_2
and task_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskCode},"%")
and sample_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleCode},"%")
and sampleHolder LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleHolder},"%")
and acceptance_date BETWEEN #{startTime} and #{endTime}
and taskPublisher LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskPublisher},"%")

SELECT sample_id, STATUS, time, operator_id, operator_name FROM test_sample_circulation_record WHERE sample_id in
#{item.sampleId}

SELECT * FROM sample_v_3
and task_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskCode},"%")
and sample_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleCode},"%")
and sampleHolder LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleHolder},"%")
and acceptance_date BETWEEN #{startTime} and #{endTime}
and taskPublisher LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskPublisher},"%")
limit #{pageNum},#{pageSize}

SELECT count(*) FROM sample_v_3
and task_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskCode},"%")
and sample_code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleCode},"%")
and sampleHolder LIKE CONCAT("%",#{sampleHolder},"%")
and acceptance_date BETWEEN #{startTime} and #{endTime}
and taskPublisher LIKE CONCAT("%",#{taskPublisher},"%")

SELECT t1.id, t1.state, t3.id AS taskId FROM test_sample AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_task AS t3 ON t2.entrustment_id = t3.entrustment_id WHERE t3.id IN
#{item}

SELECT id, company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, picture, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark,product_id FROM test_sample where sample_code in
#{code}
SELECT MAX(SUBSTR(sample_code, 9, 5) + 0) maxNum FROM test_sample WHERE sample_code LIKE CONCAT('%-', #{year}, '-%') and sample_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sampleType} ,'%')

SELECT DISTINCT t2.user_id FROM test_technicist_capacity t1 LEFT JOIN test_technicist t2 ON t1.technicist_id = t2.id WHERE t1.product_id IN
#{item}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_item_sheet_rel_head_context (id,sample_id, sheet_index, test_date_text, test_condition_text, equipment_text)
values (id,#{sampleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sheetIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{testDateText}, #{testConditionText},#{equipmentText})
